dependency_context_note: References #12550 and mentions AliasChoices but no file paths or specific module locations given
behavioral_specificity_note: States 'first to last' priority clearly but doesn't specify what happens in edge cases (empty list, single choice, etc.)

PRESENT: Core behavior: AliasChoices priority is first-to-last in the choices list
Work type: documentation + testing of existing behavior
PARTIALLY_PRESENT: Scope boundaries: 'already existing behaviour' implies no new code, but doesn't explicitly say 'doc and test only, no code changes'
Acceptance criteria: Checklist implies tests should exist, but no Given/When/Then or specific test case descriptions
Dependency context: mentions AliasChoices but no file paths, no indication of what module this lives in
ABSENT: Error states: no mention of invalid inputs, empty choices, None values, etc.
Data contracts: N/A (documentation/test only, not a data schema change)
Behavioral specificity: no concrete examples showing the priority ordering
Explicit test cases: no 'test when X choose Y' scenarios
Documentation location: where should this be documented? Which docs file?
Definition of 'priority': does first = selected first? chosen first on tie? best match?
